hero.title: Git worktree task spaces, without the ceremony
hero.subtitle: workbranch creates one task folder per feature, works across one repo or many, and keeps branch sync commands short and safe — so you never have to memorize git worktree again.

install.title: Get started in seconds
install.subtitle: Install with Homebrew or the curl script. Runs on macOS, Linux, and WSL.

features.title: Why workbranch
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run parallel tasks without the git worktree headache.

items.title: One folder per task
items.description: Every feature gets its own task workspace with linked worktrees. Switch context by changing directories, not by stashing.

items.title: Single repo or many
items.description: Drive one repo or a whole multi-repo workspace from a single task directory — frontend and backend, side by side.

items.title: Short, safe commands
items.description: update, push, status, pull. Branch sync stays a single word while workbranch handles the worktree plumbing.

items.title: No git worktree to memorize
items.description: Skip the raw git worktree flags. workbranch wraps the whole lifecycle in commands you can actually remember.

items.title: Conventional task identity
items.description: Answer 'feat' + 'login' and get a feat+login folder with a feat/login branch. Path-safe folders, conventional branches.

items.title: macOS, Linux & WSL
items.description: Core commands run everywhere. macOS adds one-key Finder, IDE, and terminal launchers for each task.

workflow.title: Two workflows, that's it
workflow.subtitle: A small, predictable command set covers the whole task lifecycle.

lifecycle.desc: Create or clone base worktrees from config

workflow.branch_subtitle: Update, push, and inspect task branches.

branch.desc: Show base diff, task diff, and dirty state
Sync a task branch with its base
Push the task branch to origin

cta.title: Stop fighting git worktree
cta.description: Spin up clean, isolated task spaces and keep your branches in sync with a handful of commands.

products.title: Services I've actually built
products.subtitle: A growing lineup of useful products, open-source tools, and small apps. Workbranch is the first one in the collection.

workbranch.title: workbranch
workbranch.description: A command-line app for creating Git worktree task spaces across one repo or many, with short commands for update, status, pull, and push.
